audio_transcription.full_text: This is a pre-operation inspection of the 320D excavator. I'm going to start by checking the hydraulic system. First, I'll look at the hydraulic cylinders, hoses, and fittings for any leaks or damage. Then, I'll move on to the bucket, checking the cutting edge, teeth, and side cutters. Next, I'll inspect the undercarriage, including the track shoes, rollers, idlers, and sprockets. After that, I'll check the engine components, such as the oil, coolant, belts, and filters. Finally, I'll examine the structural members like the boom, stick, and frame, and ensure all ground engaging tools are in good condition.
